description: You are a database developer creating a sales dashboard backend for the Chinook SQLite database at /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db. Create three SQL views: 'v_customer_spending' (including CustomerId, CustomerName [First+Last], Country, InvoiceCount, TotalSpending [sum, rounded to 2 decimals], and AvgInvoiceAmount [rounded to 2 decimals], grouped by customer and ordered by TotalSpending descending); 'v_genre_revenue' (including GenreId, GenreName, TrackCount, TimesPurchased [count of invoice items], and TotalRevenue [sum of UnitPrice*Quantity, rounded to 2 decimals], using a LEFT JOIN to include genres with no sales, grouped by genre and ordered by TotalRevenue descending); and 'v_employee_sales_summary' (including EmployeeId, EmployeeName [First+Last], Title, HireDate, CustomerCount, InvoiceCount, and TotalRevenue [sum of totals, rounded to 2 decimals], including only employees who support customers, grouped by employee and ordered by TotalRevenue descending). Save the SQL script used to create these views to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/dashboard_views.sql. Export the data from each view with headers to /home/ga/Documents/exports/ as customer_spending.csv, genre_revenue.csv, and employee_sales.csv.
